zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Brugge於1463年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾可利時，她的父親Thomas Brugge37歲，母親Florence Darell38歲。她於大約1483年與Sir Thomas Paunceforte結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1535年1月26日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾迪爾爾斯特享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Brugge于1463年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾可利时，她的父亲Thomas Brugge37岁，母亲Florence Darell38岁。她于大约1483年与Sir Thomas Paunceforte结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1535年1月26日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾迪爾爾斯特享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brugge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (Van der Brugge): topographic name for someone living near a brug ‘bridge’.
Flemish and Dutch: habitational name from Bruges.
North German (Brügge): variant of Bruck or a habitational name from any of several places called Brügge.

variants.name: Bruck
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Naftali, Eliahu, Hershel, Meyer, Ruvim, Shloime, Yoav.

German (also Brück): topographic name for someone who lived near a bridge, or an occupational name for a bridge keeper or toll collector on a bridge, from Middle High German bruck(e) ‘bridge’. Bruck remained the Bavarian and Austrian form, reflected in placenames such as Innsbruck, whereas in central and northern Germany Brück(e) was the regular and ultimately standard form, as for example in the placename Osnabrück. Switzerland has both forms. See also Brueck .
Jewish (from Poland and Belarus): from Polish, Belorussian, or Yiddish bruk ‘pavement’, possibly a metonymic occupational name for a paver.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Brugge was born in 1463, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Brugge, was 37 and her mother, Florence Darell, was 38. She married Sir Thomas Paunceforte about 1483. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 26 January 1535, in Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Brugge est née en 1463, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Brugge, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Florence Darell, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Paunceforte environ 1483. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 janvier 1535, à Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Brugge 1463 in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Brugge 37 und ihre Mutter Florence Darell 38. Sie hat um 1483 Sir Thomas Paunceforte geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. Januar 1535 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Brugge è nata il nel 1463 nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Brugge, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Florence Darell, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Paunceforte circa 1483. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 gennaio 1535, nel Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Bruggeが1463年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Bruggeは37歳，母Florence Darellは38歳であった。約1483年にSir Thomas Paunceforteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1535年1月26日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディールハルストで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Brugge(이)가 1463년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Brugge(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Florence Darell(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1483년 Sir Thomas Paunceforte(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 1월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 디후르스트에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Brugge nasceu em 1463, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Brugge, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Florence Darell, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Paunceforte aproximadamente 1483. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1535, em Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Brugge родилась в 1463 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Brugge было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Florence Darell, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Paunceforte около 1483 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 января 1535 г. в местности дирурст, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Brugge nació en 1463, en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Brugge, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Florence Darell, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Paunceforte aproximadamente 1483. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de enero de 1535, en Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
